key.name: control-port
key.description: TCP port on 127.0.0.1 where tor's ControlPort listens. Default 9051 matches the distro tor package convention.

key.name: cookie-path
key.description: Path to tor's control auth cookie (32 raw bytes). Default matches the distro tor package; the install scripts add the user to the debian-tor / tor group so the file is readable.

key.name: control-password
key.description: Cleartext password used if cookie auth is unavailable. Matches HashedControlPassword in torrc.

key.name: default-exit-country
key.description: Two-letter country code for ExitNodes. Empty means any country.

key.name: bridge-lines
key.description: One bridge line per entry, e.g. "obfs4 1.2.3.4:443 FINGERPRINT cert=... iat-mode=0".

key.name: obfs4-binary
key.description: Also used as the ClientTransportPlugin exec for meek_lite — obfs4proxy ships both.

key.name: socks-port
key.description: Default 9050 matches the distro tor package convention.

key.name: use-tun2socks
key.summary: Route all traffic through Tor via tun2socks (transparent proxy)
key.description: When enabled, ALL system TCP traffic is pushed through a TUN device that tun2socks forwards to tor's SOCKS5 port. DNS is redirected to tor's DNSPort. Requires one-time privileged setup (scripts/install-tor-tun2socks.sh) that installs a system tun2socks unit + a polkit rule so the tile stays passwordless at runtime. The tor process itself is the distro's own tor.service in either mode.

key.name: tun-address
key.summary: IPv4 address/prefix assigned to the TUN interface

key.name: tor-dns-port
key.summary: Tor DNSPort (used by tun2socks DNS redirection)

key.name: public-bridges-url
key.summary: URL the 'Fetch public bridges' button pulls from
key.description: Must serve the JSON schema produced by scripts/harvest-bridges.sh. Default points at a public gist that the project's CI refreshes daily, so it stays reachable even if the main repo goes private.
